question: How do I contact support?
answer: Four options: (1) this website chat, (2) WhatsApp, (3) email: institutional@alfardanq9.com for institutional enquiries, otc@alfardanq9.com for OTC, compliance@alfardanq9.com for KYC/compliance, shariah@alfardanq9.com for Sharia questions. (4) For existing institutional clients — your dedicated relationship manager. Our desk is available 24/7/365. Urgent security issues → WhatsApp first.

question: How do I reach the OTC desk?
answer: Email otc@alfardanq9.com, WhatsApp +44 20 1234 5678, or use the website chat. Your dedicated OTC relationship manager is Layla Al-Fayez (Head of Institutional OTC Desk) — also reachable via Signal and encrypted email.

question: Who is Layla Al-Fayez?
answer: Layla Al-Fayez is our Head of Institutional OTC Desk. She handles large-ticket execution, custom settlement terms, and VIP onboarding for clients trading $5M+ monthly. Reach her via Signal, WhatsApp, or encrypted email. For standard OTC quotes, the website chat or otc@alfardanq9.com will also route to her team.

question: How do I reach the compliance team?
answer: Email compliance@alfardanq9.com. Response typically within 2 business hours. For KYC document uploads and AML queries. For enhanced due-diligence on complex corporate structures, expect 3-5 business days turnaround.

question: How do I reach the Sharia board?
answer: Email shariah@alfardanq9.com. Our Sharia Supervisory Board is chaired by Sheikh Dr. Tariq Al-Mahrouqi, a member of the AAOIFI Sharia Board. You can request Sharia certificates, fatawa, or discussion of specific product compliance questions.

question: Who chairs the Sharia Supervisory Board?
answer: Sheikh Dr. Tariq Al-Mahrouqi chairs our independent Sharia Supervisory Board. He is a member of the AAOIFI (Accounting and Auditing Organization for Islamic Financial Institutions) Sharia Board. All Al-Fardan Q9 products are reviewed by his board for Sharia compliance. Full Sharia reports are available on our website under Shariah Reports.

question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our institutional desk is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. All channels (WhatsApp, email, chat, phone) are monitored around the clock for institutional clients. Public enquiries are answered during UAE business hours (Sun-Thu 9am-6pm GST) with overflow coverage for urgent matters.

question: Do you offer institutional integration / API?
answer: Yes — REST API for institutional clients with real-time market data, trading execution, and account management. Our API integrates with major portfolio management systems, CRMs, and accounting software. Supports 40+ blockchain protocols including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, BNB Chain, Polygon, Cardano, Polkadot, Avalanche, Cosmos, and others. Documentation available on request — contact institutional@alfardanq9.com.
